reports.title: Setup and Scope
reports.purpose: Namespace creation, repo scan, research questions Q1-Q6, prohibitions

reports.title: Strategy and Engine Inventory
reports.purpose: Code-truth inventory of 4 strategies + 2 engines, 20 confounders identified

reports.title: Parity and Signal Extraction
reports.purpose: 3-layer parity (indicator, signal, engine), canonical signal package extraction

reports.title: Factorial Sizing and Scoring Bias
reports.purpose: 4x3 factorial decomposition, scoring formula CAGR-bias audit

reports.title: Matched-Risk Frontier and Deploy Comparison
reports.purpose: 101-point frontier, matched-MDD analysis, operational risk-budget table

reports.title: Statistical Robustness and Temporal Stability
reports.purpose: Circular block bootstrap (5000 reps), Holm correction, evidence grading

reports.title: Final Synthesis and Decision Memo
reports.purpose: Final synthesis, decision framework, strategy verdicts, evidence ladder

scripts.purpose: Canonical data loader for both engines

key_findings.scoring_bias: CAGR term = 108-182% of cross-exposure score deltas (ROBUST)
key_findings.E0_signal_edge: +0.14 Sharpe at equal sizing, CI includes 0, P(>0)=74% (TENTATIVE)
key_findings.low_risk_SM_advantage: +1.2pp CAGR at 5% MDD, CI includes 0, P(>0)=77% (TENTATIVE)
